mapper.select: select r.record_id, r.ent_code, r.out_put_id, r.template_code, r.ops_unit_id, r.record_date, r.ops_user_id, r.qualified_flag, r.review_status, r.record_array, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, ext.unit_name as ops_unit_name, e.ent_name, e.region, o.out_put_code, o.out_put_name, u.user_name as ops_user_name, u.nick_name as ops_nick_name from t_ops_record r left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = r.ent_code left join t_ent_out_put_info o on o.out_put_id = r.out_put_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = r.ops_user_id left join t_ext_unit_lib ext on ext.unit_code = r.ops_unit_id where r.record_id = #{recordId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_ops_record (record_id, ent_code, out_put_id, template_code, ops_unit_id, record_date, ops_user_id, qualified_flag, review_status, record_array, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{recordId}, #{entCode}, #{outPutId}, #{templateCode}, #{opsUnitId}, #{recordDate}, #{opsUserId}, #{qualifiedFlag}, #{reviewStatus}, #{recordArray}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now())
